languages.text: "Твои методы весьма оригинальны, Эоганн. Что за эксперимент ты проводишь?"
"Your methods are highly original, Eogunn. What experiment are you conducting?"
languages.original_text: "Твои методы весьма оригинальны, Эоганн. Что за эксперимент ты проводишь?"

traits.locale_text: "Your methods are highly original, Eogunn. What experiment are you conducting?"
"Your methods are highly original, Eogunn. What experiment are you conducting?"
"Your methods are highly original, Eogunn. What experiment are you conducting?"

languages.text: "Eure Methoden sind ausgesprochen originell, Eogunn. Welche Experimente stellt Ihr an?"

traits.locale_text: « Vos méthodes sont très originales, Eogunn. Quel genre d'expérience menez-vous ? »

languages.text: “你的手法相当独特，伊奥贡。这是在做什么实验？”
languages.original_text: "Your methods are highly original, Eogunn. What experiment are you conducting?"

traits.locale_text: “你的手法相当独特，伊奥贡。这是在做什么实验？”

languages.text: «Sus métodos son singulares, Eogunn. ¿Qué experimento se trae entre manos?».
languages.original_text: "Your methods are highly original, Eogunn. What experiment are you conducting?"

languages.text: 「あなたのやり方は独創的ですね。どんな実験をしているのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Your methods are highly original, Eogunn. What experiment are you conducting?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたのやり方は独創的ですね。どんな実験をしているのですか？」

languages.text: "Yöntemlerin son derece orijinal Eogunn. Ne deneyi yapıyorsun?"
